mission.title: chaos-mesh: split pkg/utils into multiple different pkg or file
mission.description:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Fix #1254. Collecting multiple unrelated functions into one pkg is a bad idea, because the more it imports, the less it can be imported in other pkgs.

During the splitting, I followed these rules:

1. If the function is only used by one pkg, then it will be moved into the `utils.go` in that pkg.

2. If the function is used by multiple pkgs, then it will be moved into a standalone pkg to provide the utils.

In #1206, I have faced a lot of cycle importing problems caused by other files in utils 😢 .

steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
